title: Recorded Future File Reputation
content:
File reputation using Recorded Future SOAR enrichment

Cortex XSOAR/XSIAM SOAR playbook from the Recorded Future pack (RecordedFuture, partner-supported).

Inputs — MD5: MD5 hash for which to get the reputation.; SHA256: SHA-256 hash for which to get the reputation.; SHA1: SHA-1 hash for which to get reputation..

Outputs — DBotScore.Indicator: The indicator that was tested; DBotScore.Type: Indicator type; DBotScore.Vendor: Vendor used to calculate the score; DBotScore.Score: The actual score; File.SHA256: File SHA-256; File.SHA512: File SHA-512; File.SHA1: File SHA-1; File.MD5: File MD5; File.CRC32: File CRC32; File.CTPH: File CTPH.

Integrations/scripts used: Recorded Future v2.

  playbookInputQuery:

  playbookInputQuery:

  type: string
- contextPath: RecordedFuture.File.name
  description: Hash
  type: string

  description: Maximum count of Recorded Future Hash Risk Rules
  type: number
- contextPath: RecordedFuture.File.ruleCount
  description: Number of triggered Recorded Future Hash Risk Rules
